description: Style NoteA basic T-shirt to pep up your casual wardrobe, this purple tee from femella has a unique style quotient that truly represents the woman of today. The vibrant colour and the soft cotton fabric keeps you in exemplary comfort all day. Wear it with form fitting denims and style with understated accessories and peep-toe shoes.Product DetailsPurple top, has a round ribbed neck, short sleeves and embroidered branding above the left hemMaterial and Care100% cottonWash in cold water with like colours using a mild detergentDo not bleach or wringDry inside outWarm iron; do not iron on decorationsSize and FitRegularThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
